sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19779" key="beloulke/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βελουλκ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n19779.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw out darts</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐτὸς ἑαυτὸν βελουλκεῖ</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extracts the weapon</tr_> (i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hook from</tr_> itself, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.977b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
